title: lepidium latifolium subsp. sibiricum
intro: Lepidium latifolium subsp. sibiricum, also known as Siberian pepperwort, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Lepidium latifolium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Siberian pepperwort can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in Eastern Europe and Asia.
